author: Alexandre Kirszenberg
subject: Big refactoring/simplification pass
body:
Refactor RefinementList/Menu/Hierarchical/etc. to use a single List component
and move the show more logic there.

Add themeable and translatable HOCs to reduce boilerplate and prepare for
future work.

Remove PaginationLink, prefer single component rendering.

Add defaultProps option to createHOC's output in order to further parameterize
custom HOCs and move default props configuration to widgets.
